source.name: Cross-Source Entity Crosswalk
source.publisher: CA Dollar Trace (derived from cited public sources)
source.license: Derived work; each underlying figure keeps its source's license

cadence: recomputed each run from the published lane data
caveats: Organizations are matched across sources by normalized name; strong identifiers (EIN, UEI, charity CT number) are attached where a source publishes one. Name-only matches carry lower confidence than identifier-anchored ones.
A normalized name that resolves to two different strong identifiers is flagged ambiguous and not merged — better an unlinked record than a wrong one.

Amounts shown per lane keep each lane's own basis and year; they are NOT summed across lanes (a grant, a checkbook payment, and audited federal spending measure different things) — see the methodology page.
